tagline: Owner-only storefront diagnostics workspace for Ecwid merchants.
shortDescription: Run embedded storefront diagnostic sessions, review captured incidents, and export browser-local JSON reports without a production database or long-running backend.
privacyContactBlurb: Contact the support channel listed in the live marketplace listing for privacy requests.

technicalNotes.primarySurface: Merchant dashboard with embedded storefront preview
technicalNotes.storefrontBehavior: Owner-only preview session that captures incidents only while the merchant is testing
